name: Mindless Zombie

abilities.name: Demise (Walking Dead)
abilities.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with this model when it is killed.

abilities.name: Latch On
abilities.text: Enemy models in base contact with this model suffer -1 Df.

abilities.name: Pulled Down
abilities.text: Enemy models with 3 or more models with this ability within 1" may not declare general actions.

actions.name: Gnaw On Your Ear
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack receives +1 Skl for each other friendly Mindless Zombie within 1" of the target that has not activated this turn, to a maximum of +2.
actions.effects: After resolving, all other friendly Mindless Zombies within 1" of the target count as having activated.

triggers.name: Braaaaiiiins
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each other friendly model within 1" of the target, to a maximum of +2.

extraction_notes: Characteristics listed as 'Peon (5), Undead, Versatile, Zombie' - Peon (5) indicates model limit of 5
